template_metadata.name: Dynamic Pitch
template_metadata.author: Antares Agentic Environments
template_metadata.description: Evaluates tone, pacing, and narrative structure for high-stakes presentations.

system_1_live_socket.primary_objective: Monitor the audio transcript for engagement markers, pacing drops, and confidence indicators. Ignore minor logical leaps.

few_shot_calibration.user_input: Uh, I guess this might, like, help your business.
This integration will immediately reduce your server costs by forty percent.

rag_dictionary_injected.definition: Excessive use of um, ah, like, or you know, degrading perceived authority.
Using apologetic or defensive language when introducing a price or timeline.

system_2_async_council.primary_objective: Analyze the completed transcript chunk to ensure the speaker explicitly defined the Return on Investment (ROI).

rag_dictionary_injected.definition: The speaker must provide a clear and explicit call to action before concluding the segment.
